title: AccountingPro PDF export service unavailable
description: The PDF generation microservice crashed due to memory exhaustion, preventing all report exports.
rootCause: Memory leak in PDF rendering library (version 4.2.1) triggered by concurrent large-report requests.
resolution: Restarted PDF service, applied memory cap configuration, and rolled out library patch 4.2.2.

title: CRMPlatform WhatsApp integration outage
description: WhatsApp Business API webhook stopped receiving messages, causing all inbound customer messages to be dropped.
rootCause: WhatsApp Business API token expired without auto-renewal. Certificate rotation process was not automated.
resolution: Renewed API credentials, implemented automated token refresh 7 days before expiry.

title: PayrollManager batch processing timeout during month-end
description: Month-end payroll batch jobs are timing out after 2 hours for companies with more than 500 employees.

title: InventoryTracker barcode scanner API returning 500 errors
description: The barcode scanning REST endpoint started returning HTTP 500 errors for all requests, blocking warehouse operations.
rootCause: Database connection string corrupted during a configuration deployment. Connection pool exhausted.
resolution: Reverted configuration deployment, restarted connection pool, validated all database connections.

title: HRManagementSuite login page returning 503
description: Authentication service returned 503 Service Unavailable, locking all users out of the platform.
rootCause: Auto-scaling group failed to provision new instances due to an expired AWS IAM role policy.
resolution: Renewed IAM policy, manually scaled authentication service to 4 instances, implemented policy expiry alerts.

title: ProjectManager Gantt chart not loading for large projects
description: Projects with more than 150 tasks cause the Gantt chart to hang indefinitely, never completing the render.
rootCause: O(n²) rendering algorithm in Gantt chart library causes exponential performance degradation beyond 150 tasks.

title: AccountingPro email notifications queue backlog
description: Email notification queue backed up to 50,000+ messages due to SMTP rate limiting from email provider.
rootCause: Bulk invoice generation triggered mass email send that exceeded SMTP provider hourly rate limit.
resolution: Implemented exponential backoff retry queue and increased SMTP provider sending limit tier.

title: CRMPlatform reports slow response during peak hours
description: Analytics reports taking 45-90 seconds to load between 09:00-11:00 WAT due to database query performance degradation.
rootCause: Missing composite index on the opportunities table for date-range queries. Table grew to 4M+ rows.
resolution: Added composite index on (created_date, status, owner_id). Query time reduced from 45s to 1.2s.
